title: Representative's address
pageHeader: What is the representative's contact address?

repAddress1.required: Enter the first line of the representative's address
repAddress1.invalid: Enter the first line of the representative's address - up to 150 characters

repAddress2.required: Enter the second line of the representative's address - up to 50 characters
repAddress2.invalid: Enter the second line of the representative's address - up to 50 characters

repAddressTown.required: Enter a town or city for the representative's address - up to 50 characters
repAddressTown.invalid: Enter a town or city for the representative's address - up to 50 characters

repAddressCountry.required: Enter a country for the representative's address - up to 50 characters
repAddressCountry.invalid: Enter a country for the representative's address - up to 50 characters
